content.query:
SELECT * FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_dim] 
WHERE EmployeeID = 534 << should not be inactive

SELECT * FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_fact] 
--WHERE EmployeeID = 2126
WHERE EmployeeNumber = 50423888

SELECT * FROM [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[sap_hr_historic]
where pers_no = 50423888
where pers_no in (50426813,50426366,50423020,50426363)
ORDER BY pers_no, org_start_date

SELECT distinct org_start_date
FROM [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[hr_saphr]
--WHERE pers_no = 50426368
ORDER BY org_start_date


SELECT *
--, min(org_start_date) 
FROM [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[hr_saphr]
where pers_no = 50426261
-- org_start_date <> '00/00/0000'
--gRoup by pers_no
